title: VisualCraft by Moizoref
description: Make Minecraft look similar to Mojang's modern titles like Minecraft Dungeons and Legends. 1.21.1 Release!
body:
# Make Minecraft look more like Mojang's modern titles like Minecraft Dungeons and Legends.
Introducing a modpack that elevates Minecraft's visuals to a whole new level while preserving the core vanilla experience. This carefully curated selection of mods enhances the graphics, textures, and overall atmosphere, making your game look stunning without altering any gameplay mechanics. While this modpack is compatible with multiplayer servers, it’s not recommended for competitive environments like Hypixel due to potential performance impacts and ***bans***. Perfect for those who want to enjoy Minecraft in all its visual glory without compromising the original feel!
# Important Notes:

## Forge Versions

VisualCraft is now available for Forge, but with limited features. It is recommended to use the Fabric version unless you want to use Forge mods with this pack. The Forge version was created primarily for use with Cracker's Wither Storm Mod. If you experience lag while using the Wither Storm mod with this pack, disable the Physics Mod. It should run much more smoothly afterward. **The Forge version is also more demanding in hardware then the fabric version.**

# Tests:
This modpack was tested on an RTX 3050, 8GB RAM, and AMD Ryzen 5 3600 with Euphoria Patches shaders, the performance was smooth with minimal stutters in multiplayer servers and excellent in single-player mode. With a 12-chunk render distance, you can expect a steady 70-80 FPS on max shaders. This modpack includes two shader options: Complementary Reimagined with Euphoria Patches for high-end PCs, Complementary Reimagined (Normal) for mid-range systems (GTX 1080Ti etc). Each shader brings out the best of Minecraft's visuals without compromising gameplay. Whether you're exploring solo or on a server, I tried my best to offer a seamless balance of beauty and performance.

# Features
### OptiFine parity
Supports OptiFine features focused on Visuals.

### Perfomance
It is optimized for smoother gameplay with enhanced performance features to reduce lag and improve FPS without comprimising visuals.

### Works on some servers
VisualCraft can be played on mostly any world or server. You can also use any launcher to play, **Although it is not recommended to play on competitive enviornments like Hypixel and others due to potential bans.**

### Built on fabric
I have used the Fabric mod loader, which is lightweight, fast, and supports a lot of mods.

# FAQ
> **Q**:Do I need the modpack for server side as well?
>
>**A**: It is not necessary, but if you want to enhance and fix some gameplay features, It is recommended to install it on server side too.
>
> **Q**: I have other questions.
> 
> **A**: Join the [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/TQX4pdQU9P)
